chuck.def: 拋、扔、放棄、輕擊下巴、愛人、拋的人的人物、拋地 (拋)
chuck.col: chuck away (丟棄), chuck out, chuck it in (放棄)
chuck.ex: I decided to chuck away all my old and useless magazines.

chuckle.def: 呵呵笑、微聲笑、自鳴得意、笑聲地 (笑)
chuckle.ex: He gave a quiet chuckle as he remembered the funny joke.

chuckling.def: 正在笑的、滿意的的人 (或物) (笑)
chuckling.ex: I could hear him chuckling softly to himself in the corner.

chug.def: 發出嘎嘎聲、(英)攔人要錢、發嘎嘎聲地 (嘎)
chug.ex: The old steam train began to chug slowly up the mountain.

chugging.def: 發出嘎嘎聲的、穩定地前進的人 (或物) (嘎)
chugging.ex: We heard the chugging sound of the tractor from the field.

chum.def: 好朋友、室友、(用魚餌)誘魚、分室而居、好朋友地 (友)
chum.ex: He met up with an old school chum for a long lunch today.

chummy.def: 親密的、友好的的人人物 (親)
chummy.ex: They became very chummy during their long summer vacation.

chump.ex: I felt like a real chump for believing his obvious lies.

chunk.def: 大塊、厚片、矮胖的人的人、大塊的人的人物、切割地 (塊)
chunk.col: chunk of ice, chunk of cheese, fat chunk
chunk.ex: She cut a large chunk of cheddar cheese for her snack.

chunky.def: 厚實的、矮胖的人的人物 (實)
chunky.ex: She wore a thick and chunky wool sweater in the cold weather.

church.def: 教堂、教會、宗教、教職的人物 (單數)
church.col: church service, church member, go to church
church.ex: The family goes to church every single Sunday morning.

churchman.ex: The senior churchman gave a powerful speech about peace.

churchwarden.ex: He has held the office of churchwarden for over ten years.

churchyard.def: 教堂庭院、墓地人物 (單數)
churchyard.ex: The ancient churchyard was filled with old stone graves.

churl.def: 鄉巴佬、粗暴的人的人物 (單數)
churl.ex: No one liked working with such a rude and unhelpful churl.

churlish.def: 粗魯的、脾氣壞的人的人物
churlish.ex: It would be churlish to refuse such a very generous offer.

churlishly.ex: He refused churlishly even though they were being kind.

churn.def: 攪乳器、大奶罐、攪動、翻騰的人的人物、翻騰地 (攪)
churn.col: butter churn, churn out (大量產出), churn up
churn.ex: The motorboat began to churn up the local harbor water.

churning.def: 翻騰的、攪動的人 (或物) (攪)
churning.ex: I had a nervous churning stomach before the long interview.

chute/shute.def: 斜道、滑道、降落傘 (俚語)人物 (單數)
chute/shute.ex: She put the dirty clothes into the laundry chute in the hall.

chutney.ex: I love to have some spicy mango chutney with my curry.

chutzpah.def: (口)厚顏無恥、膽量優秀的人物 (單數)
chutzpah.ex: He had the absolute chutzpah to ask for a raise after failing.

cicada.ex: The loud cicada's song echoed through the hot summer trees.

cicatrice/cicatrix.def: 疤痕、傷痕、(植)葉痕的人物 (單數)
cicatrice/cicatrix.ex: A visible cicatrice on his arm reminded him of the accident.

cicerone.ex: Our expert cicerone showed us all the hidden local sights.

cider.def: 蘋果酒、蘋果汁的人物 (單數)
cider.ex: We drank mugs of hot apple cider by the warm fire tonight.

cigar.ex: The businessman sat in his chair quietly smoking a cigar.

cigarette/cigaret.ex: He decided to quit smoking cigarettes for his own health.

ciliary.def: 毛的、眼睫的人的人物 (單數)
ciliary.ex: The ciliary muscle helps the eye to focus on near objects.

cilium.ex: Each tiny cilium on the cell helps it to move correctly.

cinch.def: 肚帶、(口)容易的事、弄準的人物、弄準地 (易)
cinch.ex: Passing the local driving test was an absolute cinch for him.

cinchona.def: 金雞納樹、金雞納樹皮人物 (單數)
cinchona.ex: Quinine was originally extracted from the cinchona tree.

cinder.def: 煤渣、灰燼、焦炭、燒成灰的人物、灰燼地 (渣)
cinder.col: cinder block, burnt to a cinder (燒成灰)
cinder.ex: They built the small garden wall using simple cinder blocks.

cinema.def: 電影院、電影、電影業的人物 (單數)
cinema.col: go to the cinema, french cinema, local cinema
cinema.ex: We are planning to go to the local cinema tomorrow night.

cinematic.def: 電影的、電影藝術的人的人物
cinematic.ex: The movie offers a truly stunning cinematic experience tonight.

cinematograph.def: 電影攝影機、放映機人物 (單數)
cinematograph.ex: The early cinematograph used a hand-crank to record film.

cinematography.def: 電影攝影術、電影藝術人物 (單數)
cinematography.ex: The movie won an award for its excellent cinematography.

cineraria.def: (植)瓜葉菊、瓜葉菊屬人物 (單數)
cineraria.ex: The greenhouse was full of brightly blooming cinerarias.

cinnabar.def: 辰砂、朱砂、硃紅色的的人物 (朱)
cinnabar.ex: Cinnabar is a bright red mineral that contains mercury.

cinnamon.def: 肉桂、肉桂色、肉桂色的的人物、肉桂地 (肉桂)
cinnamon.ex: She added some ground cinnamon to the sweet apple pie.
